business_ideas.idea: LVMH: luxury goods conglomerate owning Louis Vuitton, Dior, Fendi, Sephora, etc.
Rooted: mobile app for panic attack management with breathing exercises and drills
Vesic shoes: waterproof sneakers bootstrapped from Kickstarter, Vancouver-based

predictions.text: In 10 years far fewer luxury brands will exist, survivors will be more important as wealth grows
Bootstrapped niche brands with strong founder vision outperform venture-backed companies
